a:r.a:t: We suggest starting with an 8-week discovery sprint to understand nuances unique to X client
o we have what we need to succeed?
Are we ready to put in the right resources and leadership to drive this effort?
For discussion – to be refined together
Build bottom-up market models and customer insights to identify opportunities
at the product, customer, and market level
to focus on highest-value opportunities, grow share, and lower cost-to-serve
Refine sales processes, roles, structure and compensation
to match growth goals and opportunities
through phased training and performance management
to expand SoW, reduce churn, capture whitespace and improve salesforce effectiveness, pricing discipline, and variability
Bring alignment on value at stake with a clear
target and roadmap for value capture
“Understanding challenges, opportunities, and value at stake”
“Going after the opportunity, implementing the growth playbook, and ensuring sustained impact ”
